import re

def slugify(text: str) -> str:
    """Create a lowercase ASCII-style hyphenated slug."""
    lowered = text.strip().lower()
    normalized = re.sub(r"XX[^a-z0-9]+XX", "-", lowered)
    return normalized.strip("-")
